name: LocalViking
highlight_text: Category: Google Business Profile management software
description:
What LocalViking Does

LocalViking is a cloud-based software platform for managing Google Business Profiles (formerly Google My Business management). It caters to multi-location businesses and agencies, helping manage many GBP properties.

LocalViking lets users schedule posts, track local rankings, edit listings, etc, from one centralized dashboard. Its primary features include automated posting, rank tracking, visibility, review, and location management.

Source LocalViking

Key Features

LocalViking offers the following:

  • Schedule posts for Google Business Profiles
    • Schedule and upload bulk posts to publish across Google Business Profiles.
    • It features a calendar view, which enables you to plan and schedule your Google posts visually.
    • Schedule recurring posts and maintain a consistent stream of fresh content.
  • Manage all of GBP listings in one place.
  • Automated GBP Reporting - White label and flexible Google Business Profile reporting.
  • Maps and local rank tracking - Track how your location ranks over time.
  • Local Viking offers the GeoGrid proprietary technology for local rank tracking and visibility on maps.

Benefits of LocalViking

LocalViking is a cloud-based software platform. The following are the main benefits:

  • Schedule and upload bulk posts to publish across Google Business Profiles from a centralized dashboard.
  • Evergreen content - schedule recurring posts and maintain a consistent online presence.
  • Use the LocalViking platform to manage and edit location data across your account(s).
  • Generates reports automatically for clients or shareholders (white-labeled reports).
  • Track how your location ranks over time: Monitor maps (GeoGrid) and organic search results.

Pricing

LocalViking offers five pricing categories:

  • Single: USD 39 /month
  • 1 GBP listing
  • Starter: USD 59 /month
    • 10 GBP listings
  • Pro: USD 99 /month
    • 20 GBP listings
  • Agency: USD 149 /month
    • 40 GBP listings
  • Enterprise: USD 200 /month
    • 70 GBP listings

Pros

✅Scheduling and bulk posting on GBP (Google Business Profile)

✅Offers white-label reporting capabilities

✅GeoGrid technology.

Cons

🚫Limited features - Limited to Google.

🚫No full review management system to get reviews.
